case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIA VS. PINELLI'S FLOWERLAND, INC., A CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-14-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-04-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIA TION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PINELLI'S FLOWERLAND, INC., A CORPORATION SELLAI, JOHN F. $9,742.57 PRINCIPAL, $1,300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,502.21 INTEREST, $316.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,861.08, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-14-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT PINELLI'S FLOWERLAND, INC., A CORPORATION SELLAI, JOHN F.
